data.title: Franklin Resources (BEN) Q1 earnings up, beats estimates by 27% with EPS of $0.7 & $75M increase in revenue.
data.description: Financial services company Franklin Resources, listed on NYSE as BEN, recently revealed its Q1 earnings on Friday, January 30, 2026, at 08:30 AM. The earnings report showcased substantial success. Franklin Resources exceeded expected earnings by 27.0%, with an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.7 as opposed to the projected $0.55. There was a notable increase in revenue, amounting to $75.00 million from the previous year. In the prior quarter, Franklin Resources also outperformed expectations. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: NYSE provides daily pre-market update. Cast of HBO's 'Industry' rang closing bell on Jan. 30, 2026. Ashley Mastronardi delivers update.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, in New York, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) released its daily pre-market update. This update offers crucial market insights ahead of trading hours and is directly from the NYSE Trading Floor. Ashley Mastronardi presented the pre-market update on this date.

data.title: First Hawaiian (NASDAQ: FHB) beats Q4 earnings estimate by 2.0%, reports EPS of $0.56. Revenue up $8.46 million.
data.description: First Hawaiian, a company listed on NASDAQ with the ticker symbol FHB, disclosed its fourth-quarter earnings on January 30, 2026, at 08:00 AM. The earnings report revealed that the company exceeded expected earnings by 2.0%, achieving an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.56 compared to the estimated $0.55. Additionally, the revenue saw an increase of $8.46 million compared to the corresponding period in the previous year. data.title: Britain's Royal Mail faces challenge of proving mail delivery; late letters causing distress, 500-year-old service criticized.
data.description: Delays in the delivery of letters have been causing frustration among residents in the United Kingdom, leading to criticism of the country's longstanding postal service, which dates back 500 years.

data.title: Kevin Warsh, crypto advocate, nominated by Trump to replace Powell as Fed chair. Senate confirmation ahead.
data.description: President Trump has chosen Kevin Warsh, a former Federal Reserve Governor, as his nominee to replace Jerome Powell as the chair of the Federal Reserve. This nomination will lead to a Senate confirmation process that could potentially be contentious. Jerome Powell currently serves as the Federal Reserve chair, and if the nomination is successful, Warsh will take over this critical role. This decision by President Trump will now undergo scrutiny and evaluation by the Senate before Warsh can assume office.

data.title: Challenge Island, a global STEM/STEAM education franchise, chosen for Entrepreneur Magazine's Franchise 500® for 9th year with 170+ locations.
data.description: In the latest news released on January 30, 2026, Challenge Island®, a leading global STEM/STEAM education enrichment franchise, has been recognized as a top franchise opportunity by Entrepreneur Magazine. The franchise boasts a presence in more than 170 locations across 36 states and Canada. This recognition reflects Challenge Island's continued success and commitment to providing high-quality educational programs.

data.title: VolitionRx is preparing reimbursement submission for Nu.Q® Cancer assays in France.
data.description: In Henderson, Nevada, on January 30, 2026, VolitionRx Limited (NYSE AMERICAN: VNRX) revealed its plan to submit reimbursement claims for the Nu.Q® Cancer assays in France. The multinational epigenetics company is taking this step towards seeking reimbursement for its innovative cancer tests from French government bodies.

data.title: Britain's Royal Mail faces challenge as late letters raising concerns, amid criticism of its 500-year-old postal service.
data.description: Delays in mail delivery in the UK are causing frustration among residents and sparking criticism of the country's longstanding postal service, which has been in operation for over 500 years.

data.title: Chung-Ang University scientists in Seoul generate electricity using a Tesla turbine-inspired structure with practical compressed air.
data.description: A novel method of generating electricity without direct contact has been developed, utilizing compressed air and a Tesla turbine design in Seoul, South Korea. This innovation comes in response to the growing energy needs in multiple industries. Over the past few years, researchers have been investigating the technique, with remarkable findings. The approach aims to enhance energy production efficiency and minimize environmental impact. This development marks a significant step forward in the pursuit of sustainable energy solutions.

data.title: ParaZero receives second big order from defense corp for interception net-pods, boosting growth.
data.description: In Kfar Saba, Israel, on January 30, 2026, ParaZero Technologies Ltd. (Nasdaq: PRZO) disclosed a significant update. The aerospace defense company, known for its innovative autonomous solutions in the manned and unmanned aerial systems industry, shared news of securing another important contract. This time, they received a second major order from a leading global defense corporation for their cutting-edge interception net-pods.

data.title: Amplia Therapeutics releases Q4 2025 activities & cash flow updates.
data.description: In recent data reported, the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, reflecting a decrease of 0.3% from the previous month. This shows a positive trend in job creation with over 200,000 new jobs added during the same period. However, the inflation rate has slightly increased by 1.8%, indicating a rise in overall price levels for consumer goods and services. Additionally, the stock market has experienced a notable growth with the main indexes climbing up by 2.5% on average. Overall, these economic indicators suggest a mixed outlook for the country's financial landscape.
